subject: [SO] Fix so-openstack-adapter support for Keystone V3 api
commit_message:
[SO] Fix so-openstack-adapter support for Keystone V3 api

Currently so-openstack-adapter configuration file contains hardcoded v2.0
Keystone endpoint. This fix allows for defining Keystone api version via
values/override file

Change-Id: Ib81c2888784d3d41c1ac2464c122a426743023dd
Issue-ID: OOM-2866
Signed-off-by: Marcin Wilk <m.wilk@samsung.com>

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3797/ )
